page_metadata.biotools__summary:
RePAIR is a statistical method that uses previously obtained information (Bayesian framework) to decrease the number of animals to perform well-powered research.

With RePAIR you can 1) determine prior parameters, 2) calculate sample size, and 3) analyze your results.
